Na t u ra l Fib e r s
Popsicle sticks, sawdust, toothpicks, wooden chopsticks, and untreated 
wood.
How to Collect
• Place natural fibers directly in your container (loose or in paper bags) 
and 	ensure the lid closes.
MINIMUM CONTAINER CAPACITY GUIDELINE FOR ORGANIC MATERIAL 
FOR MULTI-FAMILY CUSTOMERS:
~ Five-gallons collection capacity of organic material, per multi-family dwelling unit.
